ddls:
CREATE TABLE "instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instrument */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name of the instrument */,
  "instrument_type" TEXT /* Type of instrument (e.g., stock, option, future) */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Exchange where the instrument is traded */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the instrument is denominated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the instrument */,
  "isin" TEXT /* International Securities Identification Number (ISIN) of the instrument */,
  "create_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the instrument was created */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the instrument was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the exchange */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the exchange */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the exchange */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the exchange */,
  "create_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the exchange was created */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the exchange was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instrument_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price record */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the price record */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the instrument */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the instrument */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the instrument */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the instrument */,
  "price_source" TEXT /* Source of the price data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instrument_prices_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_volumes" (
  "volume_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each volume record */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the volume record */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the volume record */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the instrument */,
  "volume_source" TEXT /* Source of the volume data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("volume_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_volumes_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "other_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data record */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the data record */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of other relevant data (e.g., dividends, splits) */,
  "other_data" REAL /* Other relevant data */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the other data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_other_data_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, trader, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "create_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument being accessed */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was accessed */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instrument_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata record */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument */,
  "metadata_key" TEXT /* Key of the metadata (e.g., sector, industry) */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata */,
  "metadata_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the metadata */,
  "create_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metadata was created */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metadata was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instrument_metadata_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sector" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the sector */,
  "create_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sector was created */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sector was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industry" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the industry */,
  "create_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the industry was created */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the industry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)
